standards.title: Balanced and Unbalanced Forces
standards.officialText: Describe how balanced and unbalanced forces affect motion.
standards.studentFriendlyText: I can explain how balanced and unbalanced forces change motion.
standards.sourceTextSnippet: Describe how balanced and unbalanced forces affect motion.

standards.title: Representing Motion
standards.officialText: Interpret simple representations of object motion.
standards.studentFriendlyText: I can use graphs and descriptions to explain an object's motion.
standards.sourceTextSnippet: Interpret simple representations of object motion.
